iterations.theme: The Quest for Spiritual Truth and Sustaining Faith: Insights from Pascal and the Parable of the Virgins
iterations.reason_for_cut: The entire transcript is shorter than the minimum required length for a single iteration (35-45 minutes), so it forms one complete thematic unit.
